# Copilot Instructions

This repository is used for AI agent practice.

## Guidelines

### Code Quality
- Write clean, readable code with descriptive variable names
- Include type hints for better code clarity
- Add comments for complex logic

### Documentation
- Keep explanations concise and to the point
- Use structured markdown for organization
- Include docstrings in functions and classes

### Examples
- Provide runnable, self-contained examples
- Test code snippets before suggesting them
- Include expected output or behavior

## Development Practices
- Follow PEP 8 style guide (Python) or equivalent for your language
- Use meaningful commit messages
- Keep functions focused and modular

## AI Agent Development
- Structure prompts clearly
- Separate concerns (retrieval, reasoning, generation)
- Include error handling and validation
